name: transworld-engagement
releaseNote: Research Phase 2a (subscription management, DB + UI only, no email): a Manage-subscribers roster at /research/admin/subscribers (editorial sub-brand) that subscribes clients from the shared Contacts directory via a multi-select picker, adds a not-yet-in-Contacts person (creating the contact first; de-dupes on email), edits tier, soft-unsubscribes/re-subscribes, and (admin only) hard-removes a subscription; a quick research on/off toggle on the individual contact record in Contacts (house style); the research dashboard Subscribers stat and Manage-subscribers tile go live while the remaining send-side tiles stay grayed. Adds subscribed_by provenance to report_subscriptions (one additive, idempotent migration). Research subscription status stays per-channel: it never affects Greetings or Documents. No new dependencies.
